text_block_list.text:
They're heading into the third corner now! Will
anyone take the lead from here?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(...I can hear the other runners breathing. I can
feel the heat of competition on my skin.)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Wh-what the heck is up with her? For a split second... she looked like a monster!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Now this is interesting! I have to beat her now!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. But it's not good enough. I can get even
better.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Heh. ...So what's next? Hurry up and tell me,
before this feeling fades.
What should Narita Brian aim for next?

What comes to mind is a prestigious title, one
that can only be challenged once in a lifetime.

The fiercely competitive title of Triple Crown
champion.
choice_data_list: Want to go for the Classic Triple Crown?
Want to go for the Classic Triple Crown?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Then, first up is the Satsuki Sho.

And so, Narita Brian and I set our sights on the
Satsuki Sho.
